evals.prompt: Build an MCP server from the Strudel live-coding library docs at https://strudel.cc/workshop/getting-started — I want to be able to ask Claude questions about it
evals.expected_output: A fully runnable server.py and mcp_config.json in output/strudel-cc-mcp/, with clear instructions for installing into Claude Desktop
assertions: Claude asks for or confirms the target URL before running anything
Claude provides the crawl.py command with --url and --max-depth flags
Claude suggests running extract_concepts.py with --dry-run first before spending API budget
Claude provides the full sequence of 5 pipeline commands (M1-M5)
Claude explains that ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is needed for M2
Claude mentions the --smoke-test flag for M4 to verify the embedding index
Claude provides clear instructions for installing the server into Claude Desktop
Claude explains what the 8 MCP tools do after the server is built

evals.prompt: I want to index the React documentation so I can search it semantically in Claude. The docs are at https://react.dev/learn
evals.expected_output: Clear pipeline commands for the React docs, with appropriate --max-depth recommendation for a large doc site
assertions: Claude provides M1 crawl command with the React docs URL
Claude suggests --max-depth 2 or warns that React docs may be large
Claude mentions the haiku model for cost-efficiency on a large site
Claude suggests using --max-pages 20 or similar to test before full run
Claude provides the complete pipeline sequence ending with server.py generation
Claude explains the output slug will be derived from the domain (react-dev)

evals.prompt: I already ran the crawl and got 56 pages. Now I want to extract the concepts and build the MCP server. The output is in ./output/strudel-cc-mcp
evals.expected_output: Commands for M2 through M5 only, skipping M1, with dry-run suggestion
assertions: Claude does NOT tell the user to re-run the crawl
Claude provides the extract_concepts.py --dry-run command first
Claude provides the live LLM extraction command with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
Claude provides build_graph.py command pointing to ./output/strudel-cc-mcp
Claude provides build_embeddings.py command with --smoke-test
Claude provides generate_mcp_server.py command
All commands use --input ./output/strudel-cc-mcp

evals.prompt: The extract_concepts.py script ran but it says 'Skipped 46 dry-run files' when I run build_graph.py and the graph has 0 nodes. What's wrong?
evals.expected_output: Clear diagnosis that dry-run mode was used and instructions to re-run with real API key
assertions: Claude correctly identifies that extract_concepts.py was run with --dry-run flag
Claude explains that dry-run outputs have empty concept arrays (model: 'dry-run')
Claude provides the corrected command with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set
Claude does NOT suggest deleting the extracted/ folder (--force flag is sufficient)
Claude provides the --force flag to overwrite dry-run outputs

evals.prompt: Make the Tailwind CSS docs searchable in Claude. Site: https://tailwindcss.com/docs
evals.expected_output: Pipeline commands with appropriate settings for a large CSS framework doc site
assertions: Claude provides M1 command with the Tailwind docs URL
Claude recommends a reasonable max-depth (2-3) for a large docs site
Claude provides the full 5-step pipeline sequence
Claude mentions the final output will be in output/tailwindcss-com-mcp/ or similar
Claude mentions the dry-run step for cost verification before M2 LLM extraction
